subcodes.first_line: O spiritual friend! Hast thou ever heard of an invalid whose constitution was in utter turmoil in the realm of water [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای رفیق روحانی هیچ تا بحال شنیدی علیلی که مزاج در نهایت انقلاب در جهان آب در
subcodes.subjects: @autobiographical account; narrative of Abdu'l-Baha, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @consolation and comfort
